items.title: Managed MCP auth removes OAuth sprawl
items.oneliner: Enterprise MCP auth centralizes connector access in your IdP and removes per-app OAuth prompts across Claude tools.

items.title: Datasette now hosts custom apps
items.oneliner: Host sandboxed HTML apps inside Datasette with SQL access, turning a database into a lightweight internal app platform.

items.title: Pyodide can publish WASM wheels
items.oneliner: Practical guide to shipping WebAssembly Python packages to PyPI for browser apps without native install headaches.

items.title: Fix stacked PRs with rebase
items.oneliner: Clear git walkthrough for repairing stacked pull requests after squash merges using rebase --onto without mangling history.

items.title: GitHub diffs that do not choke
items.oneliner: Fast diff viewer handles huge GitHub PRs and commits that normally freeze browsers or collapse under large code changes.

items.title: Lean-based WASM interpreter for proofs
items.oneliner: Open-source WebAssembly interpreter in Lean 4 lets you execute programs and reason about correctness in one codebase.

items.title: Self-hosted SMTP relay with dashboard
items.oneliner: Dockerized multi-tenant SMTP relay routes mail across providers with quotas, logs, and a web admin panel.

items.title: Visual models to microcontroller C
items.oneliner: Browser-based MBSE tool turns diagrams into production C and Python, then runs verification on every commit.

items.title: Open iOS app exposes fingerprinting
items.oneliner: Clone this iOS app to inspect which public APIs reveal device fingerprinting signals before your app ships.

items.title: DuckDB internals explained for builders
items.oneliner: Deep technical walkthrough explains DuckDB speed using vectorized execution, columnar storage, caching, and lazy query execution.
